predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: leaves_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_descendants_of_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: is_estate_of
predicates.description: The estate belongs to the deceased person.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The person acquires the usufruct of the entire estate as a legal consequence.
